title: StoreEventRequest
description: Schema for StoreEventRequest with nested Request and Footer objects

storageProviderS3Signature.description: Base64 encoded signature of the `x-lmwrntwrk-signature` field. Signed by one of the ApiKeys of the StorageProvider

request.description: Request that was sent by the SDK to the MinIO Extension

response.description: Response that MinIO itself returns to the MinIO Extension

storageProviderPayload.description: Additional fields that are additionally added by the MinIO Extension, which are not part of the default response of MinIO

footer.description: Additional meta data about the uploaded binary.

method.description: HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, etc.)

body.description: Response body as plain text, or base64-encoded bytes

versions.description: Array of version strings for PUT requests

clientSignature.description: Signature created based on the binary data. Contains an incremental SHA256 hash of the given hash list and the file size. Signed by an ApiKey of the Account

storageProviderSignature.description: Base64 encoded signature of the `clientSignature` field. Signed by one of the ApiKeys of the StorageProvider

hashes.description: Individual hashes of slices of the binary data. Each hash is a tuple of the SHA256 hash and the amount of bytes that were hashed

fileSize.description: Size of the binary in bytes
